name: Eira the Wyrd

sheet.name: Eira the Wyrd
sheet.background_story:
Oft shunned for her unusual disposition, she found comfort in the military academy that saw value in her tactical mindset.

After rejection upon professing her love for Lady Fielding, she fled to the forests to hide and study strange texts of the wyrd.

Now she protects her unrequited love from the shadows, using a newfound power.

Plunged into the depths of The Void, forsaking love.
